name: memory-tools-by-metafish
description: Memory and continuity tools for Claude Code by metafish

metadata.description: Memory and continuity tools for Claude Code — session buffer + source distillation

plugins.name: buffer
plugins.description: Three-layer memory buffer for cross-instance continuity. Preserves decisions, open threads, concept maps, and working context across Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: distill
plugins.description: Source distillation pipeline with reference knowledge extraction. Distill PDFs, web pages, images, and recordings into structured reference knowledge. Companion to the buffer plugin.
